item.title: Goodbye my love
item.description: My wife is now at peace. No more pain. After 1000+ lab results, 100+ operations and countless sleepless nights. And 7 years of fearing this Day. Now Im gonna look to the future and love my two daughters like there is no tomorrow. But there is, there is a tomorrow and its gonna be Ok.
item.dc:creator: mlembacon

item.dc:creator: parrotguy1979

item.title: It's worse than this.
item.description: In 2020, Kroger bought back a billion dollars in shares. This is purchasing shares from investors, to prop up the share price. https://ir.kroger.com/CorporateProfile/press-releases/press-release/2021/Kroger-Board-of-Directors-Approves-1-Billion-Share-Repurchase-Authorization/default.aspx In 2021, they have instituted a similar program. This is approximately a dollar an hour raise for all employees, if it was instead used for wages. In addition, the other board members of Kroger share about another $20M. https://www1.salary.com/KROGER-CO-Executive-Salaries.html
item.dc:creator: SithElephant

item.title: We support you!!
item.description: Pretty much offered them a slap in the face for 3 years as part of their "Here's a little bit more money but it's coming out of my profits so you should feel bad" Honesty it was pennies an hour. Corporations ~Do not care about you~ We need to MAKE THEM! https://nypost.com/2022/01/13/kroger-workers-strike-as-employees-cant-afford-groceries-report/

item.title: To our confused Russian friends
item.description: For some strange, mysterious reason... a lot of Putin apologists seem to be especially active on Imgur lately. As a public service, I thought I'd make this post, to help educate those of them who have forgotten their geography. :)
